evidence: The paper uses "permutation importance method to calculate the statistical significance and contribution of each feature" with "FDR-corrected p < 0.05" values. This is not impurity importance (Gini/MDI) and thus not subject to the impurity importance bias. Main conclusions emphasize predictive validation: "we made a substantial effort to validate obtained predictions via experimental data using an extensive collection of in vitro experiments, longitudinal clinical studies, and large-scale population cohorts" rather than on feature importance ranking. Feature importance discussion explains model behavior but is not central to claims about drug-microbiome interactions.
